text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
See? What did we say? There's no<n>way you
could ever win, Nari. You're<n>just too puny!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Shut up, shut up, shut up! I—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Like hell I'm going back to sleep after<n>that...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin seems a little<n>sleep-deprived after a
restless night...
